creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
The attached diff updates lang/ghc port to v.6.10.4. This diff
supersedes all of the previous diff submitted in this PR. This diff
includes support for following FreeBSD platforms:

i386
FreeBSD 6, FreeBSD 7, FreeBSD 8

amd64
FreeBSD 7, FreeBSD 8

The bootstrap tarballs required by the port are hosted at haskell.org[1]
and freebsd.org FTP servers[2]. In case this diff gets messed up,  a
copy of this diff can be downloaded from the following URL:

http://code.haskell.org/~abbe/ghc.diff (md5: 5970435b784cb8ff61eccbadcdae3053)

References:
[1]  http://haskell.org/ghc/dist/6.10.4/freebsd/
[2]  ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/local-distfiles/pgj/

HTH
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA
